metric_caveats: This 25-record cap compares verify-repair against v4.2 monolithic direct extraction on matched records.
Verify-repair doubles model calls versus monolithic v4.2; latency is not comparable to single-pass runs.
These are partial ExECT S0/S1 diagnostics, not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Benchmark-facing fields are limited to audited diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication.
Deterministic verifier guards block add-only diagnosis and medication labels; scorer unchanged.
Compare to v4.2 cap-25 anchor (86.4% micro F1) in docs/exect_s0_label_policy_v4_2_implementation.md.
